info.name: EditDestination With Discount Recompute (% Offer)
info.description: Online ride with % offer; after StartRide rider edits destination, driver accepts, then we assert Ride.commission / discount_amount were all recomputed against the new fare. After EndRide, asserts the new finance fields on rideList and that VATInput ledger entries have NULL concerned_individual_id.

exec: // Auto-skip mock-server requests when envType is not Local.

item.name: Offline stale test drivers (avoid pool pollution)

exec: // Test-data hygiene: each collection creates a fresh driver via OTP, but old test drivers
// from prior runs accumulate in the active pool. The driver-pool selects up to N drivers per
// search by some ranking, and older drivers can crowd out the new one — causing
// 'searchRequestsForDriver: []' on the driver side. Set all other test drivers OFFLINE so
// only the current run's driver is selectable.

// Wait for async beckn search processing across services
const _delay = 5000; const _start = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - _start < _delay) {}
// Pick the estimate matching the driver's onboarded tier (env vehicle_variant) so the search hits a serviceable driver
var est = d.estimates.find(e => e.vehicleVariant === driverTier) || d.estimates.find(e => e.vehicleVariant === 'SEDAN') || d.estimates[0];
} else { console.log('No offer found on estimate'); }

pm.test('Has estimates', function () { pm.expect(d, 'response body').to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(d.estimates, 'estimates field').to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(d.estimates.length, 'estimate count').to.be.above(0); });

// Wait for async select processing before next step
const _sel_delay = 8000; const _sel_start = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - _sel_start < _sel_delay) {}
// Wait briefly before checking nearby requests
// Empty pool: driver-pool batch sizes are small (4); freshly-created test driver may not make first batch.
// Pool fires successive batches every single_batch_process_time (~22s). Retry up to 8 times with 5s gaps
// (~40s total) to catch a later batch that includes us.
console.log('Pool empty (attempt', attempt + 1, ') — retrying after busy-wait...');
if (firstOffer) { console.log('Ride has offer:', firstOffer.offerTitle, 'saved:', ride.selectedOffers.totalAmountSaved); }
pm.test('Got pre-edit ride row', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
// Pick a further destination so the new fare is observably larger.
// Helsinki bounding box: original (60.17, 24.94) -> push north-east ~3km.
pm.test('Edit accepted (BAP returned a bookingUpdateRequestId)', function () {
// Wait for async SOFT_UPDATE round-trip BAP -> BPP -> BAP on_update
// Wait for BPP to receive CONFIRM_UPDATE and transition BUR to USER_CONFIRMED
// Brief wait so the recompute writes commit before we read
pm.test('Got post-edit ride row', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
var post_commission = row.commission === null || row.commission === undefined ? '' : String(row.commission);
var post_discount = row.discount_amount === null || row.discount_amount === undefined ? '' : String(row.discount_amount);
pm.test('Discount was recomputed (% offer scales with fare)', function () {
// Brief wait for end-ride writes to flush
pm.test('Got post-end ride row', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Has at least one ride', function () { pm.expect(d.list).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
// If no VATInput rows (e.g. serviceVatPercentage not configured for city), test is vacuous-true.
pm.test('All VATInput / CancellationVATInput entries have NULL concerned_individual_id', function () {
// Wait for invoice generation after ride end
console.log('Invoice ' + i + ': number=' + inv.invoiceNumber + ' type=' + inv.invoiceType + ' amount=' + inv.totalAmountPayable);
pm.test('Response has invoices array', function () { pm.expect(d.invoices).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Selected offers has offers array', function () { pm.expect(ride.selectedOffers).to.have.property('offers'); });
// Give the ledger time to post wallet entries after ride end (incl. discount)
const start = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - start < 1500) { /* wait */ }
